name: tamarind
description: Run Tamarind Bio biology tools through the agent-friendly Tamarind CLI: discover, validate, submit, monitor, and analyze computational-biology jobs.

interface.shortDescription: Fold, dock, design, and screen biomolecules via Tamarind
interface.longDescription: Use Tamarind Bio from your agent to run hundreds of biology tools through the Tamarind CLI: predict protein/RNA/DNA/ligand complex structures, dock small molecules, design and screen binders and antibodies, and fine-tune models. The CLI owns authentication, validation, job state, and downloads; the plugin supplies workflow and scientific guidance.
defaultPrompt: Fold this antibody-antigen complex with Boltz
Dock this ligand to my receptor with AutoDock Vina
Design binders for my target and screen them
